name: product-card-hover
trigger: hover over any product card (e.g. .h-120.w-72 link to /products/<slug>)
delta: No visible change — captured el-2-rest.png vs el-2-hover.png for 'The Unicorn' card are visually identical. The card has no hover:* utility classes applied in the source DOM. Reproduced by giving .product-card no hover transform/shadow change.

name: cart-icon-link
delta: Navigates to /cart. Reproduced as a plain <a href="cart.html"> with a badge showing DoggyCart.count().
